entries.question: What was the growth rate of the cloud division in Q4 2025?
entries.expected_answer: The cloud division grew by 24.5% year-over-year in Q4 2025.

expected_citations.excerpt: Cloud revenue increased to $4.2B, representing a growth rate of 24.5% YoY.
